const now = Date.now();
const apiMatches = $input.first().json.matches || [];
const toUpdate = [];

for (const apiM of apiMatches) {
  if (apiM.status !== 'FINISHED') continue;
  const score = apiM.score?.fullTime;
  if (score?.home == null || score?.away == null) continue;

  const apiHome = MAP[apiM.homeTeam?.tla] || apiM.homeTeam?.tla;
  const apiAway = MAP[apiM.awayTeam?.tla] || apiM.awayTeam?.tla;

  const local = MATCHES.find(m => m.home === apiHome && m.away === apiAway);
  if (!local) continue;

  toUpdate.push({ match_id: local.id, home_score: score.home, away_score: score.away });
}

console.log('Jogos para atualizar:', toUpdate.length);
return toUpdate.length > 0 ? toUpdate.map(item => ({ json: item })) : [{ json: { match_id: 0 } }];
